name: @tootallnate/bntx
description: Parser and decoder for Nintendo's BNTX (Binary NinTeXture) format — the standard texture container on Switch / Wii U used by every NintendoWare-based game (MK8D, Pokémon, Mario, Zelda, etc.). Supports BC1/BC2/BC3/BC4/BC5/BC7 block-compressed textures plus all the uncompressed variants, with full Tegra X1 GOB block-linear deswizzling. Produces RGBA8 pixel buffers ready for Canvas / PNG / WebGL.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
